rag_rules: Place AGREE annex blocks in component implementation scopes for implementation-level bindings and assignments
Use assign statements only for existing output features or declared auxiliary variables in implementation scope
generic_rules: Component type annexes should contain assumptions and guarantees that refer to visible ports and features
Implementation annexes should contain bindings and assignments that are valid within the implementation scope
Do not place guarantee statements in implementation scope; use type scope for output dependency contracts
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks
Implementation-level contracts should reference subcomponent ports only through valid variables or outputs
anti_patterns: Do not use implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type contracts
Do not encode AADL timing properties as AGREE expressions unless explicit typed ports or constants are available
